name: contact-finder-actor
title: Contact Finder
description: Finds relevant contacts at companies using Hunter.io and Apollo.io APIs

input.title: Input
input.description: Contact finder configuration and the signal to enrich.

signal.title: Hiring signal
signal.description: Signal object that identifies the company and context for contact lookup.

hunterApiKey.title: Hunter.io API Key
hunterApiKey.description: Hunter.io API key used for company domain and person lookup.

apolloApiKey.title: Apollo.io API Key
apolloApiKey.description: Apollo.io API key used as a fallback contact source.

targetRoles.title: Target roles
targetRoles.description: Ordered list of target job titles to search for at the company.
